review_title: Fantastic Test management tool
description: As I am part of a Software company we need to test our software which developed.So for that we need test cases for the same this tool will create good test cases also,helps in test management tool
author: Chirag K.
pros: It is easy to use, Implementation become very easy because of the AI Powered
cons: In my first experience I have not found any issue in this.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Most efficient QA testing management tool for businesses and professionals !
description: Tuskr enables professionals and QA engineers to write quick and accurate test cases with flexibility and customization features. It helps in optimizing the test case resources in efficient manner without any wastage. The software comes with reporting and integration features with advanced scalability in fetching reports and timely progress on running tests cases. The test cases runs on cloud efficiently and provides visual monitor progress for tracks and updates
author: Anuj Ashish A.
pros: Tuskr is a robust QA testing management tool for professionals which simplifies the testing management process end to end and brings efficacy in testing process end to end. It brings smart testing process on the table which delivers desirable outcome to clients. Conducting flexible test runs with smart customization features is easily done through Tuskr. Running and managing tests cases by Tuskr is one of the most easiest thing to do. It is available with 30 day trial period and is most preferred by QA engineers.
cons: No issues seen till now. One of the leading and most efficient testing management tool for engineers. The software should undergo advancement in features time to time to keep the requirement abreast to user desire. It should be frequently checked and tested for any bug in the software so that customer should not be disappointed anytime while using the software

review_title: Good test management solution!
description: I tried Tuskr and some other tools for performing testing for our new site and the implementation couldn't be smoother. Team members also praised Tuskr for the simple and uncluttered environment.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The best part about Tuskr is it is easy to get used to. I don't have prior experience with test management tools but still I got familiar to Tuskr's environment really easily. Importing and exporting test cases is helpful in our case. Custom fields give a personalized touch to the information stored in the test cases.
cons: Reporting options are limited. Only 4 reports available. Would be nice if more reporting options are added. It would be helpful for overseeing the progress.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Test smart and fast with Tuskr ! The best test management software so far !
description: It is quite positive so far as the testing team is quite happy with its performance and also out test cases use numbers has increased multi fold post its introduction in our system. It works fine and no technical hiccups are seen while working or running test cases in cloud environment. Customizable edits and fields options enables free hand customization without any hustle. Testing has become a cake walk now and its savior for my firm
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is easy to run and deploy and Tuskr enables the testing way easier than beforeIt is customizable as well and possess excellent integration capabilitiesOne of the leading cloud based test management software with less cost and high efficiencyIt is the best software with high smart testing features available at lowest price in the market Bulk edit test cases option is available with wide variety of available test cases for learning
cons: No problem faced by my test team till now

review_title: Best Free Test Case Management Tool!
description: Overall very happy with this product where the features they provide for free are paid ones in other similar tools!
author: Peraveen K.
pros: Almost all the basic features we require from the test management tool are completely free!
cons: There is a need to run the test run at least for few times per some days. Otherwise, our account may be terminated.

review_title: Tuskr is Simple, Efficient and Affordable
author: Prajwal A.
pros: Tuskr has a user-friendly interface that is easy to navigate and understand. Testcases are created and organized in a section-wise manner within test suites, making them easy to maintain. Roles and permissions can be set up to ensure that only appropriate users have access to certain features. Additionally, the csv import feature makes it very easy to import test cases. Last but not the least it has very generous pricing plans as compared to other products that offer similar set of features.
cons: There are no major cons that I have observed till now, however a slight improvement in the UI could help in making the product more aesthetically pleasing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Tuskr works great
description: Overall i've had a good experience with Tuskr vs competators
author: Michael H.
pros: You can start out free with five users or less. And it's inexpensive to add users if you need them. I'm able to see how my tests are performing and what the results are.
cons: Kicking of the same test wasn't straight forward. I'd like to see the option to take a completed test and "run again" or clone it to run again.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Managing Test Cases Made Simple with Tuskr!
description: It provides a centralized test management platform that integrates with DevOps tools, making the testing process more efficient. This results in faster software releases and improved quality.
author: Bakkesh K.
pros: The Rich text editor makes writing test cases easy, and the ability to import spreadsheets saves time.
cons: The initial setup can feel overwhelming for new users unfamiliar with test management tools. Also reporting options are somewhat limited.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Why I like Tuskr??
description: Overall experience was great. It can track test cases easily and Tuskr also helps in optimizing the test cases. Can upload multiple test cases in a single shot with the import options, especially CSV import.
author: Arpit R.
pros: The best think about Tuskr is that its super user friendly as compared to its competition and hey there is a 30 day free trail which is always appreciated. Integration with Jira is also there using API. Customer support is also good.
cons: There are downtime cases sometimes, very rare though.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Resourceful software for optimizing test runs
description: This software efficient dashboard that displays targeted and actual results. My department has saved cost and time for running tests with flexible data testing suites in Tuskr. This is the most effective tool for test runs that I have used and I totally recommend it to other enterprises.
author: Gerald W.
pros: Tuskr has come out as the best testing software that is highly effective when I compare it with other testing tools. It has modern and efficient features for measuring effectiveness of testers that are used from different departments. The dashboard has workload chart that displays project progress and test models in place.
cons: The performance has remained to be topnotch from excellent test run results that I have experienced.

review_title: Effortless Test Management with Powerful Features
description: Overall, my experience with Tuskr has been great! It’s intuitive, well-designed, and makes test management effortless. The ability to format test cases, run flexible tests, and integrate with other tools is really useful. There’s a slight learning curve for some advanced features, but once you get the hang of it, it’s a solid and reliable platform.
author: Abdul M.
pros: Tuskr has a clean, user-friendly interface that makes test management easy. I love the rich text formatting for test cases and the seamless integration with issue-tracking tools. The flexible test runs and enterprise-grade security features are a big plus!
cons: Tuskr is feature-rich, but some advanced functionalities take a bit of time to get used to. A few more onboarding guides or tooltips could make the learning curve smoother for new users.

review_title: The integrations is the key!
author: Albert H.
pros: Definitive my best Q/A tool, is easy to use, I can implement ease in any modern project. The text editor is like the modern tool, every day I use the tool I get a great experience. I remember a problem with one of my team mates and the customer support responded fast to solve the problem with the authentication. The integration with others tools is ease, tools like Github. And other of the great features is the free plan, you can use for your personal use for free.
cons: The trial is not available for domains like Gmail, I can send invite to my friends without a company :/

review_title: Tuskr, amazing potential, but still needs a lot of work
author: Dragoș E.
pros: Tuskr offers the perfect simplicity needed for a test case management system to work properly, without creating unnecessary stress.
cons: Although Tuskr has immense potential to grow, it sometimes gives the feeling that the development process is a bit slow in this direction.

review_title: Advanced cloud based test management software for testing cases in customized way !
description: Tuskr is the leading test management platform for QA departments. It helps in managing the test cases in customizable way through simplified interface. Tuskr works efficiently in cloud and hybrid based IT environment and run test cases swiftly without any issue. It is one of the leading test management platform for businesses in current times with wider successful test case runs and higher preference amongst IT community
author: Priyanka P.
pros: Tuskr is the most preferred and widely used testing management platform for businesses to run test cases in pilot mode and identify bugs and provide earliest resolution and improve test performance. The platform is user friendly and is highly integrated with all kinds of software and dashboards and improve testing processes. The QA testing outcome has significantly boosted from performance point of view after introduction of Tuskr. Conducting seamless and error free test cases is easier with Tuskr.
cons: No issues noticed so far. It is one of the best test management platform for QA testing across IT departments to identify bugs in test cases in proactive manner. It helps in making the best data driven decision making in the QA system

review_title: Excellent tool for managing Test flows
description: Overall, Tuskr's ease of use and seamless integration have made it an invaluable asset to my daily routine. Its user-friendly interface and compatibility with my existing tools have significantly improved my productivity and overall efficiency. I highly recommend Tuskr to anyone seeking a software solution that effortlessly enhances their workflow and simplifies their tasks.
author: Lucas P.
pros: One of the standout features of Tuskr is its remarkable ease of use. From the moment I started using it, I found the interface to be intuitive and user-friendly. Navigating through the software and accessing its various functionalities was a breeze, allowing me to quickly adapt and make the most of its capabilities.
cons: While Tuskr excels in terms of functionality and usability, one area where I believe there is room for improvement is the user interface (UI) in terms of aesthetics. Although the UI is straightforward and easy to navigate, it could benefit from a more visually appealing design.

review_title: Decent software testing and project management solution
description: My overall experience with Tuskr is great.
author: Darshan T.
pros: 1) It provides you decent software testing platform. 2) It also provides you unique project management solution. 3) It has user friendly interface.
cons: I never faced any issue with Tuskr till now.

review_title: Simple & Easy Software Management Tool
author: Mizanur R.
pros: Tuskr is a very simple and easy tool for software testing. It has a great feature to list the test cases and to run the test cases is simple though. It's customizable and by using Excel import features, we can save time also.
cons: It's simplicity for doing software testing.

review_title: Tusker review with my real experiance
author: Sharath S.
pros: test run report export with image attachments

review_title: Tuskr helped us improve our efficiency
description: Tuskr solves the problem of organizing our testing process and distributing work across the team. We needed an easy interface to help us create and run test cases, track results, and report any problems or errors that occurred.
author: Antoaneta A.
pros: Tuskr helped us describe our test cases better and keep track of the process, what was tested and what we need to spend more time on. It is very easy to add comments and images for test cases and communication between colleagues.
cons: We are very happy with the current features and functionalities. It would be nice to be able to embed videos directly and to assign cards to more than one person.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Tuskr: A clean experience
description: Seamless test case management and efficient integration through Tuskr's centralized repository is all that was required by our organization, which Tuskr has successfully fulfilled.
author: Prakash K.
pros: - Tuskr's centralized repository eliminates document hunting and streamlines test case management- Its API capabilities provide a strong foundation for integration
cons: - Although the current reports are of high quality, there's an opportunity to enhance them by fusing options for customizable reports.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: One of the best test management tools out there
description: We were internally testing a bunch of TCMS tools and tuskr was one of our top choice since it ticked all our needs. It helps us observe all of our test suites
author: Shravan S.
pros: I love how I can conduct test cases right now Tuskr and visually monitor my progress. The Rich text editor is also very useful while also having the option to add custom attributes to capture important info.
cons: Lack of tooltips and user pilot often leaves confused about where to go next in my user journey,
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Simple and Effective Test Management Solution
description: My overall experience with Tuskr has been good. It is one of the best Test Management solutions I have ever used.
author: Manoj P.
pros: It provides you powerful and intuitive Test Management feature that helps you manage and run test cases easily. It offers you a seamless testing workflow with powerful filtering and custom fields. It is easy to set up and use. It offers a cost-effective Test Management Solution compared to others. Their customer support team has great product knowledge and provides excellent technical support over email and phone.
cons: Limitations with the integration of some CI/CD tools. Need some improvement in the mobile interface.

review_title: Flexible test case management that saves time
author: Manasa M.
pros: Tuskr makes test case management so much easier. I love the flexibility to group cases into suites, add custom fields, and even upload test cases in bulk through csv import—it saves me a lot of time during setup
cons: Previously It would be definitely reporting, but since now they have introduced their new customisable reporting feature, our work has been much easier and there is nothing to dislike.

review_title: Test Management Made Simpler
description: The main pain point that Tuskr has identified is test management. From earlier times, we were doing our test cases creation, handling manually. But with Tuskr software, it is possible to automate all these things and save our time. I am benefitted a lot with its features, doing testing easily saving my money, time and resources. It provides enterprise level features and ease of use. Tuskr’s versatile integration with Jenkins, Github, Cypress, Selenium etc. is of great use. It easily imports data, and we can do all our further operations.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Tuskr is a great software and power packed test management tool which makes testing very easy. It’s user interface is very simple and with this tool we can write amazing test cases. We can add different filters as per our need during test runs. It provides different features like custom fields, spreadsheet, bulk edit etc. It’s best feature is that we can analyze all the test cases visually through dashboards and workload charts. It helps in planning more and improving efficiency. Apart from all these features provided by Tuskr it seamlessly integrates with CI/CD and DevOps tools like Cypress, Jenkins. It’s Command line interface makes it easy to attach log files, test results. Automated test cases run very fast. If a test suite is deleted by mistake, we can easily restore it thus saving a lot of time. Tusk provides great security and encryption to it’s users. We can easily audit logs who changed it and when the change was made.
cons: The main disliked feature is its pricing vs benefits. In the free plan number of users and projects are limited. In the paid plans also, the maximum benefit is in Enterprise plan which is costly. So, as a small development team sometimes cost plays an important to choose a software. As an end user I want best results within my budget and expenses. Overall, feature wise it’s all good apart from pricing structure.

review_title: Comprehensive Review of Tuskr
author: Priyanka B.
pros: Tuskr’s cloud-based setup was really helpful to us. There’s no heavy installation or complex setup, we just log in and everything was ready to go!
cons: Not a dislike, but more of a suggestion I’d like to see more built-in templates for test cases and test plans.
